title: FLSNT E27 Screw Bulb 60W Equivalent 4000K Cool White, 7W A60 LED Filament Edison Screw Bulb, 806LM Cool White Light Bulbs, Non-Dimmable, Clear Glass, Pack of 4 [Energy Class E]
features: [Energy Saving]: 7W A60 screw in light bulb, made of clear glass and LED filament, are equivalent to 60W traditional incandescent bulbs, save up to 88% energy and electricity, each A60 edison screw bulb is lasting about 15000 hours.

[4000K Cool White]: This cool white light bulbs provide 806 lumens brightness, 4000K cool white emits soft cozy light to fully illuminate your space with a beam angle of 360 degrees, creating a comfortable atmosphere.
[Easy to Install]: No tools are required for installation. Simply screw this bulb into any E27 base light. (NOTE: This gls e27 bulb is not dimmable, please DO NOT use it with dimmer switch.)

[High Quality LED Bulbs]: No lead or mercury. No UV or IR. Good to your family, high quality LED light bulbs. If you have any problem or need any support, please feel free to contact us on Amazon, we hope you have a better shopping experience.

[Wide Application]: Standard e27 screw, easy to screw in and use, are ideal for home, commercial and residential, like bedroom, living room, bathroom, kitchen, hotel, offices, museum, gallery, shopping malls, restaurants or other places you'd like to decorate with.
description: Product Description Previous page 4000K Cool White 4000K cool white light fully illuminates your space with 360° beam angel, creating a cozy atmosphere Avoiding Eye Fatigue Providing a more stable, comfortable, and healthy lighting experience, suitable for various occasion Color Rendering Index of 80 A bulb of CRI 80 can accurately render object colors, offering a more natural lighting effect 806LM Bright LED Bulb Opaque fixtures reduce the brightness, our 806LM LED bulb solves it, meeting your lighting needs Next page 1 4000K 2 No Flicking 3 CRI 80 4 806LM
